title: limonium ovalifolium
intro: Limonium ovalifolium, also known as sea lavender or oval leaf sea lavender, is a low-growing, perennial succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its high content of limonin and other flavonoids. The health benefits of Limonium ovalifolium include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as providing antioxidant properties that can protect against cell damage. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote overall health and well-being.
